title: Zelda TOTK Ambient Music
body:
This resource pack works only with [Dynamic Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-music-updated) mod installed !

And one of these config files to place into your config folder :

[dynmus1](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1_RJhv3Eg_PyA0FL6RM6GqecHmznMacBl/view?usp=sharing) This config file will play Zelda TOTK music as it is in the original game.
When it's raining you'll get rainy music from the game.
When it's night or day, even in cold biomes and hot biomes. 
It's like having TOTK ambient music in Minecraft !

[dynmus2](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gmf8wyW8qEyl3Egy7mvdeqMS4JvJCZGb/view?usp=sharing) This config file allows rainy and night music to play when it's still day and clear weather.
Because always hearing the same day music can be a bit boring (if you always stay in the same biome and always skip night as example)
